name: the grouping preserves each tool's own reporting id, namespaced as tool/reporting-id, as the rule key
command: printf '%s' '{"version":"2.1.0","runs":[{"tool":{"driver":{"name":"ruff"}},"results":[{"ruleId":"F401","level":"error","message":{"text":"unused"}}]}]}' > a.sarif && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/group-findings-by-rule.sh" --dir . --json 2>/dev/null | node -e 'const j=JSON.parse(require("fs").readFileSync(0,"utf8"));process.exit(j.rules["ruff/F401"]?0:1)' && echo reporting-id-preserved 1>&2
